---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="MaryLind_CV_May2026.pdf" target="_blank" role="button">
  <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download CV (PDF)
</a>

<br><br>

<iframe
  src="MaryLind_CV_May2026.pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="1000px"
  style="border: none;">
</iframe>
---
